title: Inflation fears are back in the spotlight as the Middle East conflict keeps oil prices elevated, analysts say
summary_full: Inflation fears are back in focus amid worries over escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran in the Middle East conflict which has kept oil prices elevated
summary_public: Inflation fears are back in focus amid worries over escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran in the Middle East conflict which has kept oil prices elevated
